name: v-tooltip-lite
description: Lightweight, Customizable Tooltip/Dropdown Component for Vue 3
author: safdar-azeem

scripts.prepare:dist: npm run build && cp package.json README.md dist/
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run prepare:dist && cd dist && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run prepare:dist && cd dist && npm publish
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm run prepare:dist && cd dist && npm publish
scripts.publish:dist: npm run prepare:dist && cd dist && npm publish
